original_title: HODV-21506 Hey, since we've had a break together for the first time in a while, why don't we have sex all today? Rika Aimi
overview: The two of them spend the whole day together on holidays after a long absence, flirting SEX with awakening in the morning. Eat a late breakfast we made together and take a leisurely date around the city. Going home, getting excited and having sex while dealing with her evil spirit. Ichafera in the bath, SEX that starts naturally in the relaxing after dinner. A vivid day of a haphazard estrus couple.
